title: Mechanical Trash Coarse Rake Bar Screen With Sewage Treatment Pla
summary: An automated rotary rake bar screen that continuously removes debris and solids from fluids, used in sewage treatment plants, water supply systems, and industrial applications such as textile and food processing.
bullets: High automaticity and high separation efficiency

specs.label: Rake Tooth Material
specs.value: ABS engineering plastic, nylon, or stainless steel

specs.label: Frame Material
specs.value: Stainless steel or carbon steel with corrosion protection
